description_long: This is a modern chair with a curved, wraparound wooden backrest and sides, forming a semi-enclosed shell. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a sophisticated and natural appearance. The seat is upholstered in a soft, gray fabric, providing a comfortable sitting surface that contrasts with the hard wood. The chair stands on four straight, sturdy wooden legs, each matching the backrest in color and finish. The design is minimalist yet elegant, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as cafes, waiting areas, or stylish offices. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A modern chair with a curved dark wood backrest and sides, paired with a soft gray upholstered seat and four matching wooden legs. Its minimalist design blends comfort and elegance, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved wooden backrest, gray upholstered seat, and all four legs clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuous curve of the wooden backrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width and curvature of the wooden backrest, with legs visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the wraparound design and the seat's integration with the backrest.
